## Summary

Adds auto-refresh polling and a prominent status indicator to the admin Pipeline Health page so you can watch job progress without manually reloading.

- **30-second auto-refresh** — silently re-fetches data in the background without triggering the loading spinner
- **Big pulsing green light + "LIVE" label** — shows the page is actively polling and connected
- **Red light + "STALLED" label** — appears when a refresh fails (network issue, server error)
- **Last refresh timestamp** in the subtitle line

## Scope

- `app/admin/pipeline-health/page.tsx` — added `setInterval` poller, `lastRefreshedAt` / `refreshFailed` state, status light UI

Does NOT touch: API route, data model, any other admin pages.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Polling is lightweight (same GET endpoint already used on page load)
- Auto-refresh skips the loading spinner to avoid flickering
- If the fetch errors, only the status light turns red — existing data stays visible

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — UI-only change to an admin page, no pipeline logic affected.
